positive: A minimalist, high-contrast silhouette design featuring a majestic forest of stylized, abstract pine trees arranged in a symmetrical crescent shape. The trees should be solid black shapes against a vibrant, gradient background of deep indigo fading to cerulean blue at the top. Include subtle, scattered gold foil specks suggesting mist or distant stars. The overall composition must be centered and suitable for large-scale apparel printing, emphasizing clean lines and graphic impact. Vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, clean silhouette, highly detailed, crisp lines, centered composition, symmetrical balance, bright color pop.
negative: photo, realistic, blurry, text, watermark, logo, letter, artifact, grainy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, lowres, low detail, cartoon, sketch
